MINI MINUTES: Appearances (by Zoom):
Seema Bhatt, Esq. 415-788-9000 x102 Minami Tamaki LLP for Plaintiff.
Carla N. Braunstein, Esq. 925-222-3400 Wood Smith Henning & Berman LLP for Defendant.
Court reporter: Ryan Wheeler, CSR #13717, ryanwheeler91@yahoo.com, reported.

ARGUED. The Court poses questions to Ms. Braunstein. Ms. Bhatt argues. Ms. Braunstein responds and argues. The Court having reviewed the pleadings and having heard oral argument rules as follows:

DEFENDANT UBER TECHNOLOGIES, INC.'s Motion To Compel Arbitration And Stay Action.

Taken Under Submission.
